agent-tasks.title: List tasks for repository

parameters.name: owner
parameters.description: The account owner of the repository. The name is not case sensitive.

parameters.name: repo
parameters.description: The name of the repository. The name is not case sensitive.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: The number of results per page (max 100).

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page number of the results to fetch.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: The field to sort results by. Can be updated_at or created_at.

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: The direction to sort results. Can be asc or desc.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of task states to filter by. Can be any combination of: queued, in_progress, completed, failed, idle, waiting_for_user, timed_out, cancelled.

parameters.name: is_archived
parameters.description: Filter by archived status. When true, returns only archived tasks. When false or omitted, returns only non-archived tasks. Defaults to false.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Only show tasks updated at or after this time (ISO 8601 timestamp)

parameters.name: creator_id
parameters.description: Filter tasks by creator user ID

agent-tasks.descriptionHTML:
Note

This endpoint is in public preview and is subject to change.

Returns a list of tasks for a specific repository

tasks.name: Fix the login button on the homepage

id.description: Unique task identifier

name.description: Human-readable name derived from the task prompt

id.description: The unique identifier of the user

creator.description: The entity who created this task

id.description: The unique identifier of the user

user_collaborators.description: User objects of collaborators on this task

id.description: The unique identifier of the user

repository.description: The repository this task belongs to

id.description: The unique identifier of the repository

state.description: Current state of the task, derived from its most recent session

session_count.description: Number of sessions in this task

items.description: A resource generated by the task

oneOf.description: A GitHub resource (pull request, issue, etc.)

id.description: GitHub resource ID

artifacts.description: Resources created by this task (PRs, branches, etc.)

archived_at.description: Timestamp when the task was archived, null if not archived

updated_at.description: Timestamp of the most recent update

created_at.description: Timestamp when the task was created

agent-tasks.title: Create a task

parameters.name: owner
parameters.description: The account owner of the repository. The name is not case sensitive.

parameters.name: repo
parameters.description: The name of the repository. The name is not case sensitive.

bodyParameters.name: model
bodyParameters.description: The model to use for this task. The allowed models may change over time and depend on the user's GitHub Copilot plan and organization policies. Currently supported values: claude-sonnet-4.6, claude-opus-4.6, gpt-5.2-codex, gpt-5.3-codex, gpt-5.4, claude-sonnet-4.5, claude-opus-4.5

agent-tasks.descriptionHTML:
Note

This endpoint is in public preview and is subject to change.

Creates a new task for a repository.

agent-tasks.title: Get a task by repo

parameters.name: repo
parameters.description: The name of the repository. The name is not case sensitive.

parameters.name: task_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the task.

agent-tasks.descriptionHTML:
Note

This endpoint is in public preview and is subject to change.

Returns a task by ID scoped to an owner/repo path

agent-tasks.title: List tasks

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: The number of results per page (max 100).

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page number of the results to fetch.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: The field to sort results by. Can be updated_at or created_at.

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: The direction to sort results. Can be asc or desc.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of task states to filter by. Can be any combination of: queued, in_progress, completed, failed, idle, waiting_for_user, timed_out, cancelled.

parameters.name: is_archived
parameters.description: Filter by archived status. When true, returns only archived tasks. When false or omitted, returns only non-archived tasks. Defaults to false.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Only show tasks updated at or after this time (ISO 8601 timestamp)
